title: Si Sa Ket Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Si Sa Ket with a Z-Score of +3.74. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures with a Score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Si Sa Ket is causing significant concerns with a CRITICAL level warning issued. 
 The temperature is exceptionally high, resulting in a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) of 12.1 GG, while the Heating Degree Day (HDD) is 0.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 74% and the wind speed is 8.0 km/h, exacerbating the heat wave conditions.
conclusion: Implement immediate measures to mitigate the heat wave effects.
